name: Sun Messe Co., Ltd.
summary: Sun Messe Co., Ltd. operates as a communication service center for printing, publishing, digital media, videos, and events businesses in Japan. It provides various commercial, publishing, package, and form printing products. The company also offers promotion solutions, such as catalogue promotion support, image database, manuscript submission, 3D computer graphics, inventory management, shipping agent, flier creation support, digital flier, POP advertising entry, and area marketing systems. In addition, it provides digital press services, including information processing, print on demand, continuous form digital press, multi binding, automatic inclusion/sealing, final inspection function, one-to-one printing, and original envelop processing services; and 3D package design and package CAD data creation systems, as well as sample cutters, in-store promotion and exhibition room products, joggers, UV printers, Thomson die cutters, and folding and gluing machines. Further, the company offers support in the areas of website operation, smart device database optimization, social network site advertisement, iBooks and electronic books creation, digital signage, video content creation, augmented reality, application development, Web analytics, online-shopping site operation, member management, and web promotion; and plans and operates festivals, ceremonies, conventions, exhibitions, and other local and promotional events. Additionally, it provides center RIP system to link clients to printing plants; off-site proofreading system, a proofreading and automatic checking system; and printed electronics, as well as silk screen and UV printing, clean assembly room, glue binding, carbon management, communication, and design services. Sun Messe Co., Ltd. was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Ogaki, Japan.
